creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed


I'm sorry to say that I don't find a compelling case for adding 
these features, and no one else has requested it. There are a 
number of ways that you can keep records of portmaster sessions 
using existing tools (such as script) and I am uncomfortable 
with the idea of adding more complexity for limited benefit. 

If I get time in the future I may revisit the idea of a simple 
option to save the log files if I can find an easy way to do 
it. 

In any case, thanks for your interest in making portmaster 
better! 


Regards, 

Doug
